title: TZ-10 real last_run trace
objective:
Read governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md first. Create file governance/validators/validate_last_run_real_trace.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations
import json
from pathlib import Path

REQUIRED=['trace_id','readiness_level','status','events']
FORBIDDEN_ACTIONS={'status','deterministic status action'}

def main()->int:
    path=Path('governance/state/OBJ-GD-001_last_run.json')
    if not path.exists():
        print('missing OBJ-GD-001_last_run.json'); return 1
    data=json.loads(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    missing=[key for key in REQUIRED if key not in data]
    if missing:
        print('missing fields: '+', '.join(missing)); return 1
    if data.get('action') in FORBIDDEN_ACTIONS or data.get('result') in FORBIDDEN_ACTIONS:
        print('status stub is forbidden'); return 1
    if not isinstance(data.get('events'),list) or len(data['events'])<5:
        print('events trace too short'); return 1
    print('PASS: last_run contains real trace shape')
    return 0
if __name__=='__main__': raise SystemExit(main())

Create file governance/state/tz10_last_run_trace_status.json with content {"stage":"TZ-10","status":"last_run_trace_validator_added","release_pass":false,"validator":"governance/validators/validate_last_run_real_trace.py","trace_output":"governance/state/OBJ-GD-001_last_run.json","next_action":"RM-progress aggregate status"}
